title: wislizenia refracta var. melilotoides
intro: Wislizenia refracta var. melilotoides, also known as the 'Melilotoides Wislizenia', is a plant species that belongs to the family Cleomaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Wislizenia refracta var. melilotoides include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying its leaves and roots to create teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
